faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about QAIROSS

whatIs.question: What is a QAIROSS?
whatIs.answer: A QAIROSS is a mobile-optimized web page that brings together all your business information in one place: social media, WhatsApp, location, services, products and more. It's accessed via a QR code or a direct link.

noCode.question: Do I need to know how to code to create my QAIROSS?
noCode.answer: Not at all. QAIROSS is designed so anyone can create their QAIROSS without technical knowledge. Everything is edited from a visual and intuitive dashboard. Just upload your logo, add your data and publish.

howQr.question: How does the QR code work?
howQr.answer: When you publish your QAIROSS, it automatically generates a unique QR code. You can download it in PNG or SVG (depending on your plan) and print it on cards, tents, banners, flyers or any advertising material.

editAfter.question: Can I edit my QAIROSS after publishing?
editAfter.answer: Yes, you can edit your QAIROSS at any time from your admin dashboard. Change texts, photos, colors, buttons and services. Changes are reflected instantly for your customers.

orders.question: How do my customers place orders?
orders.answer: There are two ways: on the Pro plan, your customers build their order and when they confirm, WhatsApp opens with the details. On the Premium plan, orders arrive at your internal panel where you can manage statuses and notify your customers.

printQr.question: What can I print the QR code on?
printQr.answer: You can print your QR on business cards, advertising tents, banners, flyers, stickers, menus, tables, displays and any printed material. The SVG format guarantees quality at any size.

planDifference.question: What's the difference between plans?
planDifference.answer: The Trial plan is free for 1 month with basic features. The Basic plan includes social media and gallery. The Pro plan adds a full catalog, WhatsApp orders and statistics. The Premium plan includes everything plus internal orders, custom domain and priority support.

cancel.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription whenever you want without penalty. Your QAIROSS will remain active until the end of the paid period. There are no lock-in contracts or hidden charges.

orders.title: Receive orders directly
orders.subtitle: Two ways to receive orders depending on your business needs

whatsapp.description: Your customers build their order from your QAIROSS and when they confirm, WhatsApp opens with the full details. You receive the message and manage everything from your phone.

panel.description: Orders arrive directly to your QAIROSS panel. Manage statuses, notify your customers and keep a complete record of all received orders.
